allow: Bash(python3 -c "import gunicorn, sys; print\('gunicorn', gunicorn.__version__, '| py', sys.version.split\(\)[0]\)")
Bash(PORT=8200 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=dummy timeout 3 python3 -m gunicorn app:app --bind 0.0.0.0:8200 --workers 1 --threads 2)
Bash(DB_PATH=/tmp/sa_demo/win.db RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH=/tmp/sa_vol python3 -c "import search_agent as sa; print\(sa.DB_PATH\)")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add Railway deploy config \(gunicorn, volume-aware DB\) *)
Bash(RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH=/data python3 -c "import search_agent as sa; print\('   DB_PATH =', sa.DB_PATH\)")
Bash(DB_PATH=/data/custom.db RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH=/data python3 -c "import search_agent as sa; print\('   DB_PATH =', sa.DB_PATH\)")
